summary_en: ROE 24.0% (FY3/26), PBR 2.5x, equity ratio 31.6%. Target equity ratio 35%+ (goal 40%) mid-term. Mid-term plan 'Beyond 1000' targets sales ¥100B, overseas sales ratio 30%, operating profit ¥7.0B by FY3/29. Focus on ROE maintenance/improvement and PER uplift via information disclosure and investor dialogue.
title_en: Update on Approach to Realizing Management Conscious of Cost of Capital and Stock Price
translation_en_brief: Hibino Corporation filed an update on 22 May 2026 regarding its approach to realizing management conscious of cost of capital and stock price. The company analysed that its cost of equity (via CAPM) runs 6–8% in recent periods, averaging approximately 7%, while ROE reached 24.0% in FY3/26, substantially exceeding capital cost. PBR stands at 2.5x, and equity ratio improved to 31.6%. To enhance enterprise value further, the company aims to improve both ROE and PER (price-to-earnings ratio). The mid-term plan 'Beyond 1000' (FY3/27–FY3/29) targets sales of ¥100 billion, overseas sales ratio 30%, and operating profit ¥7.0 billion. Financial stability initiatives include maintaining equity ratio at 35%+ with a longer-term goal of 40%. Shareholder returns will rest on stable dividend payments with increases aligned to profit growth. The company will strengthen financial and non-financial disclosure and investor dialogue to lift market perception and earnings multiples.
